ISLAS' MOTION TO STRIKE THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED; THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES A BASIS FOR A CLAIM AGAINST THIS DEFENDANT DEFENDANT BASED ON THE CURRENT NOTICE. DEFENDANT'S IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6 (C).ANSWER TO BE FILED WITHIN 5 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J.
